source._note: Real OSM highway=raceway way 293789503 at 3002 N I-70 Frontage Rd, Grand Junction CO (Mesa County). Closed 54-node ring, native CCW winding reversed to CW. ROAD COURSE (~0.9 mi advertised, 11 turns, ~9.75 m/32 ft wide asphalt sprint/kart circuit). Flat mesa-top site north of I-70; elevation from USGS 3DEP bare-earth (do NOT flatten); NO banking. A '1.25-mi oval/banked' web claim was a conflation with other venues and is rejected.

road_profile._doc: Flat road course — no banking. dips/cambers intentionally empty; deck follows bare-earth 3DEP.
